name: Tibshelf

locations.name: Tibshelf
locations.address:
Bolsover District Council,
Sherwood Lodge,
Bolsover,
Chestefield

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Tibshelf. It belongs to the North East Local Policing Unit.
The village was originally a mining village and is situated close to the M1 motorway. Tibshelf Motorway Service area is part of the Safer Neighbourhoods area.
